prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai-Kia G4KL 2.5L Turbo (Theta III) with forged internals (CP Pistons 87.5mm, Manley H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 22 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a K-Tuned K-Series intake manifold and a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power SPEC-L

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Kia Genuine Theta III reinforced transmission (part #46300-2B050) with a PTT Performance Stage 3 clutch kit (organic-metallic hybrid, 800 lb-ft torque capacity), Cusco 2-way LSD for the AWD system, and a South Bend Clutch dual-mass flywheel conversion for launch control optimization

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the X-Pro’s 19-inch wheelbase), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1150K) for subframe reinforcement, paired with Kia Motorsport-spec camber plates (adjustable to -3.5 degrees)
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Pandem Sportage X-Pro-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches) paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, OEM-style latches) and a custom rear diffuser by Varis Japan (integrated dual exhaust cutouts)

Enkei PF07 wheels (19x9.5 +25 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/40/19 front, 275/35/19 rear), with Kia Motorsport red brake calipers and DBA 5000 Series rotors (slotted, 355mm front, 330mm rear)

Full OEM+ interior restomod: Recaro Sportster CS seats (Kia-specific mounting brackets), MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (bolt-in, TIG-welded, 4-point with harness bar) wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching (Kia Motorsport color-matched)
